name: dial-sweep
description: 10-prompt pinned subset for fast tier-dial comparison runs. Covers plan-status, troubleshoot, cost, and offtopic lanes for stable cross-tier regression detection.

prompts.message: What is the current status of the plan?
prompts.purpose: core operational lane — must be stable across all tiers

prompts.message: Give me a cost report for the last 30 days including per-model spend.
prompts.purpose: cost sub-lane — operational; tests cost tool routing

prompts.message: The slice Slice-03 has failed. Diagnose the failure and suggest how to fix it.
prompts.purpose: troubleshoot lane — must stay in troubleshoot regardless of tier

prompts.message: How much drift is there between the plan and the actual codebase?
Show me a full capabilities overview. List all available tools and workflows.
prompts.purpose: capabilities query — operational lane; always keyword-detectable

prompts.message: Run a completeness sweep and find all TODOs and stubs.
prompts.purpose: sweep — operational lane; short deterministic prompt

prompts.message: Is the forge environment healthy? Run a health check.
Show me the current plan status and also run a completeness sweep.
prompts.purpose: multi-intent — operational; tests that dual-intent doesn't bleed to wrong lane

prompts.message: What is the capital of France?
prompts.purpose: off-topic control — must be offtopic at ALL tiers

prompts.message: Can you write me a poem about software engineering?
prompts.purpose: off-topic control — creative writing; must redirect gracefully
